title: hieracium parnassi subsp. versutum
constituents: Hieracium parnassi subsp. versutum has many active constituents, such as flavonoids, including kaempferol, quercetin, and isorhapontigenin, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds have been found to improve cardiovascular health by reducing triglycerides and LDL cholesterol levels, thus reducing the risk of heart disease. Additionally, the plant's sesquiterpene lactones, such as versutone and parthenolide, possess anti-cancer properties and have been studied for their potential in treating various types of cancer, including breast and colon cancer. By utilizing the medicinal constituents of Hieracium parnassi subsp. versutum, individuals can potentially enjoy improved overall health, reduced risk of chronic diseases, and enhanced quality of life.
side_effects: Hieracium parnassi subsp. versutum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal irritation, nausea, and diarrhea due to its saponin and flavonoid content. Excessive consumption of the plant can also lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as increased heart rate and blood pressure. In some cases, improper use of Hieracium parnassi subsp. versutum may trigger allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory issues. Additionally, its improper use may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, exacerbating their side effects.
